data.title: BitGo Becomes First Crypto Custodian to File for US IPO
data.description:
BitGo has filed for an initial public offering (IPO), becoming the first crypto custodian to pursue a listing on a US stock exchange.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitgo-becomes-first-crypto-custodian-to-file-for-us-ipo/

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Central New Energy Holdings Group plans to explore new energy digital assets and other fields.
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Zhonghuan New Energy Holdings Group, a Hong Kong-listed company, announced that it has entered into a strategic cooperation framework agreement with Ant Blockchain Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., intending to explore areas such as new energy digital assets and new energy artificial intelligence ecology. Ant Blockchain will provide technical support in blockchain technology, full-link solutions for data assets, artificial intelligence large models and ecological integration.

data.title: Blockchain gaming company Immutable announces shift to a mobile-first strategy
data.description: Blockchain gaming company Immutable has announced a shift to a "mobile-first" strategy and the establishment of a mobile gaming division to accelerate mainstream adoption of Web 3 games and simplify on-chain product integration for mobile developers. The company also plans to invest in mobile gaming studios within the Immutable ecosystem, but has not yet disclosed specific investment details. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Up To $4,250 Per Person To Be Handed Out As California Firm Reaches Data Breach Settlement
data.description:
A California-based real estate firm has agreed to settle a lawsuit over a data breach that exposed the sensitive information of its customers. According to the settlement administrator’s portal, FPI Management will pay out between $100 and $4,250 to victims of the breach, which happened five years ago.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/20/up-to-4250-per-person-to-be-handed-out-as-california-firm-reaches-data-breach-settlement/

data.title: First-Ever XRP-Backed Stablecoin Kicks Off: Details
data.description:
With new development by Enosys, DeFi customers can collateralize their XRP holdings to mint stablecoins on Flare
source: https://u.today/first-ever-xrp-backed-stablecoin-kicks-off-details

data.title: CZ: France has seen a decline in public security over the past few years, with numerous crypto kidnappings occurring. I hope the situation will improve.
data.description: After Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform revealing his early donation to the Notre Dame Cathedral restoration fundraiser, he added that he hoped this move would help make France safer to some extent. He said that France has indeed experienced a decline in public security in the past few years, with multiple crypto kidnappings and the "Telegram founder Pavel Durov investigation," but he still hopes the situation will improve.

data.title: Ethereum Staking Queue Reaches Lowest Level in Four Weeks Amid Market Concerns
data.description:
According to PANews, the Ethereum (ETH) staking entry queue has dropped to its lowest level in four weeks, raising concerns about a potential large-scale sell-off due to an increase in the exit queue. However, the market has observed that ongoing purchases and holdings by Ethereum treasuries and spot ETH ETFs are mitigating the selling pressure. Many of these institutions have either already staked their assets or plan to do so to earn additional returns, which could lead to an increase in the staking entry queue in the coming weeks.

Another positive expectation is the potential launch of an ETH staking ETF. This development suggests that some investors might release liquidity and later re-enter related products to adjust their market exposure, rather than completely exiting the ETH market. The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has set a final approval deadline for April 2026. However, analyst Axel Bitblaze anticipates that approval could be granted as early as October 2025. He noted, "BlackRock's ETH staking approval deadline is in October, and I believe approval is likely to occur."

data.title: JU platform token breaks through 9 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 30%
data.description: The JU platform token continued its upward trend today, surpassing 9 USDT and representing a nearly 30% increase in 24 hours. At the Ju.com × xBrokers Hong Kong Stock Market Liquidity Global Digital Summit, CPPCC National Committee member and Legislative Council member Li Zhenqiang made a surprise appearance. Several guests engaged in in-depth discussions on Hong Kong stock market liquidity, RWA asset innovation, and Web 3 integration. The atmosphere and policy attention at the summit were seen as boosting market confidence.

data.title: Binance: Alpha airdrop available today at 21:00, threshold: 200 Alpha points
data.description: Binance Alpha airdrops will begin at 9:00 PM (UTC+8) today. Users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim the tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully redeemed or the event ends. Further details will be announced later.

data.title: Gate has launched Syndicate (SYND) spot trading.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate launched Syndicate (SYND) spot trading at 03:00 (UTC+8) on September 20.

data.title: Huang Licheng, the "Big Brother" has opened a 3x leveraged ASTER short position
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, "Big Brother Maji" Huang Licheng has opened a 3x leveraged ASTER short position. He also holds long positions in ETH (15x leverage), PUMP and HYPE (5x leverage), and is currently facing a floating loss of US$4 million.

data.title: Coinbase CEO sets sights on replacing banks with crypto super app
data.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong has outlined plans to build a crypto super app, offering credit cards, payments and Bitcoin rewards to rival traditional banks.

data.title: Google set to undergo several cost-cutting measures
data.description:
Technology giant Google has announced plans to undergo several cost-cutting measures, including ending its enterprise subscription to the Financial Times. According to several sources, the media house is not the only one on the list, with the recent cuts reflecting broader efforts by the company to cut costs. Google has been implementing several cost reductions […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-set-to-undergo-several-cost-cutting-measures/

data.title: ODDER briefly broke through 0.2 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 20.19%.
data.description: The market data shows that ODDER briefly broke through 0.2 USDT and is now trading at 0.18666 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 20.19%.

data.title: Coinbase's help in unblocking Durant's account sparked dissatisfaction in the crypto community, and the CEO promised to improve the product.
data.description: NBA star Kevin Durant's agent, Rich Kleiman, and Durant previously revealed that he helped Durant purchase Bitcoin, but that the Bitcoin was locked in his Coinbase account after he forgot his password. This incident garnered market attention, and Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong quickly responded, claiming he had helped Durant recover his account. However, this move sparked outrage in the crypto community, with some pointing out that their Coinbase accounts had been locked for years and still not restored, representing the same problem but a completely different solution. In response, Brian Armstrong posted on the X platform, stating that Coinbase prioritizes providing better customer support on both ends and pledged to improve its products to minimize issues and provide a faster, higher-quality experience when support is needed.

data.title: Musk: X platform is expected to achieve "pure AI algorithm" in November, supporting interactive adjustment of feed through Grok
data.description: Nikita Bier, product director of social media platform X, wrote that the goal of the platform's timeline is to break away from the mainstream algorithm and let users find their own place. They are currently working to solve related problems. In response, Musk said that the X platform expects to implement a "pure AI algorithm" in November. This work has made significant progress. The algorithm is now open sourced approximately every two weeks. If the goal cannot be achieved in November, it will definitely be achieved in December. Users can adjust their information flow (Feed) by asking Grok.

data.title: Fed Cuts Suggest ‘Wind’s Blowing in a Favorable Direction for the Bulls’ in the Equities Market, Says Goldman Sachs Executive
data.description:
Goldman Sachs executive Tony Pasquariello thinks the equities market is top-heavy, but he still isn’t bearish. In a new Goldman podcast, Pasquariello says compounded earnings growth has brought the market to where it is today, and he notes that he’s “just not willing to pick a fight with that momentum.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/20/fed-cuts-suggest-winds-blowing-in-a-favorable-direction-for-the-bulls-in-the-equities-market-says-goldman-sachs-executive/

data.title: Curve Ecosystem Director haowi.eth denies Onekey and Wang Lei’s joint statement and subsequent comments
data.description: haowi.eth, head of the Curve ecosystem, posted on the X platform: "Recently, Onekey and its founder Wang Lei (also known as yishi) issued a joint statement accusing them of making false statements about me regarding the so-called Resupply vulnerability. This incident triggered a series of personal attacks and false accusations. This matter has nothing to do with any DeFi project or industry risk. I deny the joint statement issued publicly by Onekey and Wang Lei and their subsequent remarks. There is no point in making statements without basis or evidence. I have not been subject to legal sanctions in any country. Any statement should be based on irrefutable facts. I reserve all rights and will act according to my judgment. As a member and investor of the Curve community, I have expressed my views and facts to defend the legitimate rights and interests of myself and other investors. I will actively pursue legal means to protect my rights and will not tolerate any malicious defamation or personal attacks."

data.title: Viewpoint: SOL Treasury will form healthy competition with the Solana Foundation to promote ecological growth
data.description: Vibhu, head of product marketing at the Solana Foundation, posted on the X platform that the treasury company with the largest SOL holdings will compete with the Solana Foundation and use resources to efficiently develop the ecosystem, but this may be beneficial to the entire Solana network. Therefore, he remains optimistic about this development trend, which may drive SOL higher. This is actually very similar to the "second foundation" that the Solana Foundation once promised to the community.
